text.message: I get left with scraps sick

and then stole my offer to blue lol

i can do ns for ns oj
I know I just don’t get why you would let a player block you and also get the card they want
Especially since red didn’t have an action they were trying to keep
isnt it better to rob the player with an action they're trying to keep?
since it's an adversarial board game
But they didn’t and in turn they allowed a block and a steal giving oj a massive play
he had one card so i coudlve just got the brick from him anyway
have i produced anything besides sheep yet lol
there was no point in him saying no to ns
I think you just force the steal and don’t give the player extra

this has been a slow game
especially given how high proudction the board is

its cool, I like last place
Do t let them talk to you like that I got your back blue
